=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/runEffectInsideEffect.ts(14,21): suggestion TS377024: Using Effect.runSync inside an Effect is not recommended. Effects inside generators can usually just be yielded. effect(runEffectInsideEffect)
/.src/runEffectInsideEffect.ts(22,5): suggestion TS377074: Using Effect.runPromise inside an Effect is not recommended. The same services should generally be used instead to run child effects.
Consider extracting the current services by using for example Effect.services and then use Effect.runPromiseWith with the extracted services instead. effect(runEffectInsideEffect)


==== /.src/runEffectInsideEffect.ts (2 errors) ====
    import { Data, Effect } from "effect"
    
    class DebuggerError extends Data.TaggedError("DebuggerError")<{
      cause: unknown
    }> {}
    
    export const program = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const response = yield* Effect.tryPromise({
        try: () => fetch("http://localhost:9229"),
        catch: (e) => new DebuggerError({ cause: e })
      })
      const data = yield* Effect.promise(() => response.json())
    
      const websocket = Effect.runSync(Effect.sync(() => new WebSocket(data.url)))
                        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377024: Using Effect.runSync inside an Effect is not recommended. Effects inside generators can usually just be yielded. effect(runEffectInsideEffect)
      //                        ^- do not runSync in here
    
      websocket.onmessage = (event) => {
        const check = Effect.tryPromise({
          try: () => fetch(event.data as string),
          catch: (e) => new DebuggerError({ cause: e })
        })
        Effect.runPromise(check)
        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377074: Using Effect.runPromise inside an Effect is not recommended. The same services should generally be used instead to run child effects.
Consider extracting the current services by using for example Effect.services and then use Effect.runPromiseWith with the extracted services instead. effect(runEffectInsideEffect)
        //        ^- no runPromise, use the current services instead
      }
    })
